'''baworo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wharfhead|wharfhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wharfhead|wharfhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| baworo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæwereth|bæwereth]] || [[word:bæwerej|bæwerej]] || [[word:bæweresh|bæweresh]] || [[word:bæwere|bæwere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawoworoth|bawoworoth]] || [[word:bawoworoj|bawoworoj]] || [[word:bawoworosh|bawoworosh]] || [[word:bawoworo|bawoworo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baworoth|baworoth]] || [[word:baworoj|baworoj]] || [[word:baworosh|baworosh]] || [[word:baworo|baworo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawofroth|bawofroth]] || [[word:bawofroj|bawofroj]] || [[word:bawofrosh|bawofrosh]] || [[word:bawofrof|bawofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baworotho|baworotho]] || [[word:baworojo|baworojo]] || [[word:baworosho|baworosho]] || [[word:baworoko|baworoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baworoth|baworoth]] || [[word:baworoj|baworoj]] || [[word:baworosh|baworosh]] || [[word:baworo|baworo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baworothol|baworothol]] || [[word:baworojol|baworojol]] || [[word:baworoshol|baworoshol]] || [[word:baworokol|baworokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baworothotho|baworothotho]] || [[word:baworojojo|baworojojo]] || [[word:baworoshosho|baworoshosho]] || [[word:baworoko|baworoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baworothon|baworothon]] || [[word:baworojon|baworojon]] || [[word:baworoshon|baworoshon]] || [[word:baworokon|baworokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baworothoro|baworothoro]] || [[word:baworojoro|baworojoro]] || [[word:baworoshoro|baworoshoro]] || [[word:baworokoro|baworokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
